modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with setting animation timings in PowerPoint.

full_description_text: I want to set timings for animations. I can't figure it out. It’s not working like I expected. Just need some guidance on this.
short_description: Need help with setting animation timings in PowerPoint.
description: I want to set timings for animations. I can't figure it out. It’s not working like I expected. Just need some guidance on this.
